description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsRed wallet with press button closure Paneled and top stitched front with metal brand badge Five credit card slots, a photo id card holder with two slip pockets on the flapOne zippered and two main compartments Six credit card slots and a slip pocket set in the liningOne zippered pocket at back Guarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
